message:
feat(cli): Add pane observation status to list and robot state commands

Multi-agent implementation completing wa-4vx.4.11 (pane selection filters UX):

- Add PaneEntry to PaneRecord conversion methods in ingest.rs
- Add PaneRegistry helper methods (to_pane_records, observed/ignored_pane_records)
- Add PaneState struct for CLI output with observation status
- Enhance `wa list` command to display observed vs ignored panes
- Enhance `wa robot state` command to return pane observation status in JSON
- Add WaitConditionExecutor with pattern matching and idle detection
- Fix heuristic_idle_check test data (50% -> 50/100 to avoid tcsh prompt match)
- Add tempfile dev-dependency for tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
